hooks.prompt: The command '${input.command}' is about to be executed. If this is NOT a git commit command, respond with allow immediately. If this IS a git commit, review the session's work before committing: (1) incomplete implementations or TODO left behind, (2) debug code or temporary hacks, (3) security issues in the changes, (4) commit message follows convention (feat/fix/docs/refactor/test/merge/chore). If everything looks good, allow. If there are real problems, block and explain briefly.
